programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Wolves are unbeaten in their last six Premier League games against Spurs, with their four wins in that time just one fewer than they had in their first 17 against them in the competition. Tottenham have lost their last three away league games against Wolves, as many as they had in their previous 16 visits to Molineux.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Newcastle United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21. Newcastle are winless in their last 13 Premier League away games against Arsenal, and have scored just one goal in their last nine visits to the Emirates Stadium.

programme.desc: Villarreal have won their last four home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their longest winning streak at home against the Galician side in the competition's history. Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Villarreal ; they have not gone three consecutive league games without defeat against the Yellow Submarine since November 2019.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E30
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: EN EPL The Big Interview 2025/26 | E37 - Diego Gomez

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.47 - Norwegian Strikers
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: EN EPL The Big Interview 2025/26 | E37 - Diego Gomez
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest names.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Newgiza P2
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: EN Fast Zone 2026 - Ep 2
programme.desc: On this weeks show we have highlights from the Monza Rally show, we chat to young autocross driver Jakub Novotny about his love for the sport and we bring you an insight into the importance of tyres in truck racing.

programme.title: Arsenal vs OL Lyonnes - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Marseille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Marseille have won 60 matches against Nice in Ligue 1, the record for victories by one team against another in the history of the competition. Having won the reverse fixture 5-1, Marseille are looking to complete a league double over Nice for the first time since 2018/19. Marseille have the 10th best record in Ligue 1 in 2026, a contrast to their standing at the end of 2025, when they were third.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Espanyol have lost only two of their last 14 LaLiga matches against Levante, having lost five of their previous six, and only against Celta de Vigo have they drawn more games than against the Granotas in the competition since 2013/14. At home, Espanyol have lost only two of their 15 LaLiga meetings with Levante, although they have conceded exactly three goals in each of the last two.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -148
programme.desc: ONE Friday Fights 148 brings another stacked night of Muay Thai, kickboxing, and MMA action from Bangkok. In the main event, a Rajadamnern Stadium World Champion returns for a record 17th appearance on the series, facing Mehrdad Khanzadeh after his dramatic comeback win last time out. Also on the card, Denkriangkrai looks to extend his four-fight streak against Moldovan puncher Valerii Strungari, plus more top matchups.

programme.title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Angers have lost each of their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Paris Saint-Germain, the longest losing streak for a single team against the same opponent in top-flight history. Angers have not won any of their last 13 home games against Paris SG in Ligue 1, losing the most recent seven.

programme.title: Al Ahli (KSA) vs FC Machida Zelvia (JPN) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Manchester City vs Southampton - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Semi Final 1

programme.title: Marseille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Marseille have won 60 matches against Nice in Ligue 1, the record for victories by one team against another in the history of the competition. Marseille have the 10th best record in Ligue 1 in 2026, a contrast to their standing at the end of 2025, when they were third.

programme.title: Burnley vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their 19 Premier League games against Man City. They’ve lost their last 11 in a row against them, their longest ever losing run against an opponent in their league history. Manchester City have won 14 of their last 15 Premier League games against Burnley since a 1-0 loss at Turf Moor in March 2015.

programme.title: Everton vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs. Arsenal - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Fulham vs Aston Villa - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Having lost just two of their first 13 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, Fulham have now lost three of their last four against them at Craven Cottage. Aston Villa have won their last six Premier League games against Fulham, since a 3-0 loss in October 2022. Only against Coventry have they won more consecutively in the competition.

programme.title: EPL Match Officials Mic'd Up 2025/2026
programme.desc: PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb joins Michael Owen to provide context and explanation behind refereeing decisions, using match footage and previously un-released audio between the on-field officials and VAR teams.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Everton - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: West Ham have won just three of their last 17 Premier League home games against Everton, though two of those have come in their last four against them at the London Stadium. Everton have won more Premier League games against West Ham both overall and away from home than they have vs any other opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Rayo Vallecano are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Real Sociedad since a 2-1 defeat in April 2023; this is their longest unbeaten run against the Basque side in their top-flight history. Real Sociedad have picked up points in each of their last seven away LaLiga matches against Rayo Vallecano, their longest unbeaten run away from home against the Madrid side in the top-flight, and their longest ongoing unbeaten away streak against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Real Oviedo have won four of their last six LaLiga matches against Elche, one more victory than they managed in their previous 13 top-flight meetings. Following their 1-0 victory at the Martínez Valero in September, Elche have the opportunity to complete a league double over Real Oviedo for only the second time in their history, having previously done so in the 1964/65 campaign.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Sevilla - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Osasuna are unbeaten in their last four home LaLiga matches against Sevilla, their longest such run against the Andalusian side in the competition since May 2009. Sevilla FC ended their longest winless streak against Osasuna in LaLiga history with their 1-0 victory in November 2025; they have not won consecutive league matches against them since October 2021.

programme.title: Villarreal vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Villarreal have won their last four home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their longest winning streak at home against the Galician side in the competition's history. Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Villarreal ; they have not gone three consecutive league games without defeat against the Yellow Submarine since November 2019.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Everton - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: West Ham have won just three of their last 17 Premier League home games against Everton, though two of those have come in their last four against them at the London Stadium. programme.title: Valencia vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Valencia CF have won only one of their last six LaLiga matches against Girona – a 2-0 victory in September 2024 – having won four of their first five meetings in the competition. programme.title: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 home league games against Athletic Club since a 0-2 defeat in January 2011 at the Vicente Calderón; it's their longest home unbeaten run against the Basque side in LaLiga history. Following their 1-0 win at San Mamés in December 2025, Athletic Club are looking to win back-to-back LaLiga games against Atlético de Madrid for the first time since October 2011, and for the first time in the same league season since 1999/2000 under Luis Fernández.

programme.title: Qualifying - MotoGP Spain 2026
programme.desc: The MotoGP paddock arrives at Jerez for the Spanish Grand Prix, where MotoGP, Moto2 and Moto3 come together at one of the sport’s most iconic and atmospheric tracks. Famous for its passionate crowd and technical layout, Jerez is a circuit that rewards precision, balance, and confidence, setting the stage for intense racing throughout the weekend in all three categories.

programme.title: Sprint Race - MotoGP Spain 2026

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Nîmes vs Toulouse - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Granada vs Almeria - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.
